title: 雲の向こう、宙のかなた

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I visit the library with Admire Vega, but she
suddenly disappears.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's dangerous to use the step ladder like that.
Remember, you're an Umamusume before a
librarian.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I have to do my best to be careful... for the
success of the Meteor Shower Corner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meteor shower? That reminds me, I saw
something on TV about one happening soon. The
library must be preparing something for it.
choice_data_list: Your special event corner looks fun.
Your special event corner looks fun.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's not even complete yet.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
This book or that book... I wonder which one is
easier to understand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Another day, I'm headed out to do some research
alone when...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
There must be something I can do to thank you
for helping me out again.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I don't need anything. Rather, you should keep
working.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Give me half of those papers. I'll cut them.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
U-um... Thank you again! You're even helping me
with my description texts!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm just seeing this through to the end. Besides,
you seemed a little stuck.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah... I'm supposed to be researching, but I
keep getting drawn in by the mythology.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...I can see that. You're often reading stories
about heroes at the checkout counter.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Look, it says "Meteor Shower Corner"! That
reminds me, we'll be able to see one soon, right?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
The academy is supposed to be a great spot to
see it! Maybe reading up beforehand will make it
more fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The display corner is finally complete. I'm looking
forward to the day of the event and seeing how
much their work together pays off. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the meteor shower... I see Zenno
Rob Roy staring gloomily at the rain running
down the windows.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Haha... The weather can't be helped. We'll have
to look forward to the next opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
All the visitors to our special corner must be
really disappointed too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Was all our work really for nothing?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The books we selected, the crafts we struggled to
make, not to mention the time spent writing out
explanations on the poster.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Even if the sky is blocked out by clouds, the stars
and our efforts don't just disappear.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You're right! I...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
We learned so much prepping for this event. Like
about meteor showers that come from afar and
the fascinating heroes represented in
constellations...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ayabe, thank you! I'll be back!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
"Stargazing Without the Stars"? Wow, this sounds
interesting! Can we join?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Even if we can't see the stars, we can still
talk about them.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
True, we already learned so much just by reading.
By the way, I came across a funnily named meteor
shower! It's called Hair Strands.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So this is what she came up with. A meeting in the
library for talking about stars... In other words,
"Stargazing Without the Stars."
choice_data_list: You really came through in the end.

Do you have any tips about stargazing to tell
them?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: This wasn't my idea.
choice_data_list: But what you said motivated her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Sure, but she's the one who made it happen. This
is all her doing.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Quit looking at me like that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I must not have done a very good job hiding my
smile. Her expression does look less severe now
though.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Stargazing tips? I wanna know!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
We want to be able to see the meteor shower
next time! How should we go about starting?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I want to know too! If it's not too much trouble...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega begins to quietly speak. Although
somewhat blunt, she carefully explains while the
Umamusume around her listen in silence.
